narrative:
Groveport-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 846 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
